page: Microsoft Azure EC20as_v5 is an ECASv5-family virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated vCPUs built on an AMD processor with x86_64 architecture. The server is configured with 160.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the EC20as_v5 offers a memory-optimized hardware profile. This resource density is qualitatively cost-effective for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without the overhead of excessive CPU cores. It is suited for memory-intensive applications, relational databases, caching layers, and enterprise workloads that benefit from Premium Storage compatibility.
description: Microsoft Azure EC20as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECASv5 family, powered by an AMD x86_64 processor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs and 160.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance external block storage configurations. The server is designed without integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its high memory density, the EC20as_v5 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads that do not require local ephemeral disks. It is well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring significant memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC20as_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 160.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC20as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine with 20 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 160 GB RAM, and Premium Storage support.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring twenty dedicated AMD cores, one hundred sixty gigabytes of RAM, and premium external storage compatibility.
bullet_points: 20 dedicated vCPUs on x86_64 AMD architecture
160.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external block storage
No local ephemeral storage or integrated GPUs
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and enterprise workloads
